$schema_note: Example structure for toolkit adoption. Adjust schema rules to match your repo conventions.

surface.hero.brand.usage: Hero headers, onboarding banners, premium CTA surfaces.
surface.hero.brand.contrast_notes: Do not place low-contrast secondary text directly on the most saturated zone.
surface.hero.brand.animation_notes: If animated, prefer subtle translation or opacity layering instead of changing stops every frame.

surface.card.premium.usage: Premium cards, upgrade surfaces, subscription highlights.

accent.glow.primary.usage: Focal glow behind featured content or key CTA clusters.
accent.glow.primary.contrast_notes: Do not use as the only background for dense text.
accent.glow.primary.animation_notes: Opacity pulsing is safer than dynamic recoloring.

border.ring.focus.usage: Focus rings, circular progress accents, premium selection states.
border.ring.focus.contrast_notes: Ensure ring thickness and surrounding surface contrast are sufficient.
border.ring.focus.animation_notes: Rotate container or shader transform if possible; avoid rebuilding complex sweep data repeatedly.

overlay.scrim.media.usage: Text legibility over media, gallery headers, video poster overlays.
overlay.scrim.media.contrast_notes: This token exists primarily to stabilize foreground readability.
overlay.scrim.media.animation_notes: Usually static; if revealed, animate opacity.
